name: Swedish Potato Cakes
recipeIngredient: 2 medium baking potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the egg, flour, milk, sugar, and 1 tablespoon melted margarine. Blend on high until smooth.
2. Add half of the cubed, raw potatoes to the blender. Blend on high speed until smooth.
3. Add the remaining potatoes to the blender and blend on high until smooth.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or longer.
5. Heat an 8-inch skillet over medium heat. Add 1 teaspoon margarine and swirl to coat the bottom of the pan.
6. Pour about 3 tablespoons of the mixture into the skillet, coating the bottom of the pan. Cook for one minute or until lightly browned.
7. Turn the potato cakes and cook for another minute on the other side, adding more margarine as needed.
8. Repeat with the remaining batter, adding margarine as needed.
9. Serve immediately with applesauce or your choice of topping.
